title: ferray-autodiff: no integration with ferray-core — DualNumber can't be stored in Array
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

DualNumber<T> does not implement ferray_core::Element, so it cannot be stored in Array<DualNumber<f64>, D>. This means you can't do vectorized forward-mode AD — computing derivatives of array-valued functions. The crate only works on scalar functions. For batch Jacobian computation, sensitivity analysis on arrays, and as a bridge to ferrotorch, DualNumber must integrate with the ferray array ecosystem. Implement Element for DualNumber<f64> and DualNumber<f32>, or provide Array-aware derivative/gradient functions that operate on ferray arrays.
